## Base branch

- [ ] Feature / fix work targets **`develop`**
- [ ] Release PR is **`develop` → `master` or `main`** (not a feature branch into release)

## Test plan

- [ ] `.\scripts\validation\validate-all.ps1` passes locally (or `./scripts/validation/validate-all.sh` with pwsh)
- [ ] New/renamed skills appear in `docs/SKILLS.md` and README Skills table
- [ ] Underscore naming preserved for AG skill folders
- [ ] No secrets or org-only credentials in the diff
